svg.title: Multiplicity peak and Gaussian sharpening
svg.desc: Two-panel figure: top panel shows exact normalized binomial multiplicity bars for N=6 (ochre), N=20 (ink), and N=100 (red) peaking at N_up/N=0.5; bottom panel overlays the corresponding Gaussian envelope exp(−2s²/N) for each N, showing dramatic narrowing as N grows from 6 to 100.
svg.text: Multiplicity Ω(N, N↑)/Ω_max and Gaussian approximation
